title: Replace QRIS payment image with uploaded image

requirements.text: Replace the existing QRIS payment image in the OrderForm component with the newly uploaded QRIS image (G191285866-0703A01-default.png). Save the image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/qris.png and update the src reference in OrderForm.tsx to point to this new file.
acceptanceCriteria: The QRIS section in the OrderForm displays the new uploaded QRIS image (showing DIMSUM OJI / NMID: ID1026488874078).
The old QRIS image is no longer shown anywhere in the app.

nonGoals: Modifying any other part of the OrderForm beyond the QRIS image.

required: QRIS payment code card with white background, red accent shapes, QRIS logo top-left, GPN eagle logo top-right, bold text 'DIMSUM OJI', NMID ID1026488874078, label A01, large black QR code center, red footer strip with payment method icons (qris.dim_800x1100.png)
